name: Bug Fix Live Test Cycle
description: Test-owned bug fix playbook used for repeatable live workflow proofs.
outcome: Minimal safe bug fix with a regression test and review evidence.

definition.process_instructions: The live-test developer reproduces the reported bug and adds a failing regression test before implementing the minimal fix. The live-test QA engineer verifies the fix resolves the reported behavior and checks nearby edge cases. The live-test reviewer performs the final review. Persist substantive output to the repository, not only handoffs.

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: What this bug-fix workflow should accomplish

parameters.name: bug_report
parameters.description: Description of the bug to fix

columns.label: Planned
columns.description: Work is defined but not yet assigned.

columns.label: In Review
columns.description: Primary work is complete and under review.

columns.label: Blocked
columns.description: Work is blocked and needs intervention.

columns.label: Done
columns.description: The work item meets its acceptance criteria.

stages.name: reproduce
stages.goal: The bug is reproduced and a failing regression test exists

stages.name: fix
stages.goal: The minimal safe fix is implemented

stages.name: test
stages.goal: QA verifies the fix and edge cases

checkpoints.name: reproduce
checkpoints.goal: The bug is reproduced with a failing regression test.

checkpoints.name: fix
checkpoints.entry_criteria: A reproduction and failing test exist.

checkpoints.name: test
checkpoints.entry_criteria: The fix is implemented and pushed.
